html:query.declare: <!--ROW oi_empresa="" oi_carpeta="" oi_adelanto="101" f_adel_desde="" f_adel_hasta="" oi_estado_ant="" oi_clasif_sujeto="" adelantos_anulados="" salida="HTML" /--> <ROW oi_empresa="" oi_carpeta="" oi_adelanto="" f_adel_desde="" f_adel_hasta="" oi_estado_ant="" oi_clasif_sujeto="" adelantos_anulados="1" salida="HTML" />

qry:select.name: GetAdelantos
GetConceptos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto, LEG04_DETALLE.oi_concepto, SUM(LEG04_DETALLE.n_importe) as monto FROM LEG04_MODO_PAGO, LEG04_DETALLE
JOIN LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_modo_de_pago INNER LEG04_DETALLE.oi_modo_de_pago
WHERE LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} GROUP BY LEG04_MODO_PAGO.oi_adelanto, LEG04_DETALLE.oi_concepto
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetConcepto
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT LEG53_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto, LEG53_CONCEPTOS.d_concepto
FROM LEG53_CONCEPTOS
WHERE LEG53_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto = {$PARAM/@oi_concepto}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetRendido
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo, SUM(CONC.n_total) as total_conc
FROM LEG06_RENDICIONES as REN, LEG06_COMPS_RENDICION as COMP, LEG06_CONCEPTOS_COMP as CONC, LEG63_TIPOS_COMPROB as TC
JOIN REN.oi_rendicion INNER COMP.oi_rendicion, CONC.oi_comp_rendicion INNER COMP.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.oi_tipo_comprob INNER TC.oi_tipo_comprob
WHERE REN.l_anulado = 0 AND REN.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} AND CONC.oi_concepto = {$PARAM/@oi_concepto}
GROUP BY COMP.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetTransferido
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo, SUM(CONC.n_total) as total_conc
FROM LEG06_RENDICIONES as REN, LEG06_COMPS_RENDICION as COMP, LEG06_CONCEPTOS_COMP as CONC, LEG63_TIPOS_COMPROB as TC
JOIN REN.oi_rendicion INNER COMP.oi_rendicion, CONC.oi_comp_rendicion INNER COMP.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.oi_tipo_comprob INNER TC.oi_tipo_comprob
WHERE REN.l_anulado = 0 AND REN.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} AND CONC.oi_concepto = {$PARAM/@oi_concepto} AND ISNOTNULL(COMP.f_transferido)
GROUP BY COMP.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetTransGP
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT D.oi_concepto, SUM(D.n_importe) as monto FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS as A, leg04_modo_pago as MP, leg04_detalle as D
JOIN A.oi_adelanto INNER MP.oi_adelanto, MP.oi_modo_de_pago INNER D.oi_modo_de_pago
WHERE A.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} AND D.oi_concepto = {$PARAM/@oi_concepto} AND ISNOTNULL(MP.f_transferido)
GROUP BY D.oi_concepto
')/ROWS/ROW
